SELECT MAX(Percent_Eligible_Free_K12) FROM frpm WHERE County_Name = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School_Name, Percent_Eligible_Free_Ages_5_17  FROM frpm  WHERE School_Type = 'Continuation Schools'  ORDER BY Percent_Eligible_Free_Ages_5_17  LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Zip FROM schools WHERE County = 'Fresno' AND Charter = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.MailStreet FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode ORDER BY f.FRPM Count (K-12) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE Charter = 1 AND FundingType = 'Directly funded' AND OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE AvgScrMath > 400 AND Virtual = 'P'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.District, s.County, ss.NumTstTakr  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.NumTstTakr > 500 AND s.Magnet = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.Phone  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE AvgScrMath > 1500 OR AvgScrRead > 1500 OR AvgScrWrite > 1500)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS TotalTestTakers FROM satscores WHERE cds IN (     SELECT CDSCode     FROM frpm     ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC     LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE AvgScrMath > 560 AND schools.Charter = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT FRPM_Count_Ages_5_17 FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT CDSCode FROM schools WHERE CDSCode IN (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE enroll12 > 500)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX(Percent_Eligible_Free_Ages_5_17)  FROM frpm  JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds  WHERE (satscores.NumTstTakr * 1.0 / frpm.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > 0.3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode ORDER BY (ss.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / ss.NumTstTakr) DESC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESSchool FROM frpm ORDER BY Enrollment (Ages 5-17) DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT dname, AVG(AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.StatusType = 'Active' GROUP BY dname ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds  WHERE schools.StatusType = 'Merged'  AND schools.County = 'Alameda'  AND satscores.NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.CharterNum, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE sa.AvgScrWrite > 499 GROUP BY s.CharterNum ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Fresno'  AND f.Charter Funding Type = 'Directly funded'  AND sa.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE frpm.CountyName = 'Amador'  AND frpm.LowGrade = '9'  AND frpm.HighGrade = '12'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'  AND Free Meal Count (K-12) > 500  AND FRPM Count (K-12) < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, MAX(sa.NumTstTakr) AS MaxTestTakers FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.County = 'Contra Costa' GROUP BY s.School ORDER BY MaxTestTakers DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School, Street, City, State, Zip  FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE ABS(frpm.Enrollment_K_12 - frpm.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.SchoolName  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE f.PercentEligibleFreeK12 > 0.1 AND sa.NumTstTakr > 0 AND (sa.AvgScrRead + sa.AvgScrMath + sa.AvgScrWrite) >= 1500	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.FundingType  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds  WHERE s.City = 'Riverside' AND sc.AvgScrMath > 400	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School AS School_Name,         s.Street || ', ' || s.City || ', ' || s.State || ' ' || s.Zip AS Full_Address FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Monterey'    AND f.Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) > 800    AND f.School Type = 'High Schools (Public)'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore, s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School, DOCType  FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE FundingType = 'Locally funded'  HAVING (Enrollment_K12 - Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > (SELECT AVG(Enrollment_K12 - Enrollment_Ages_5_17)                                                    FROM frpm                                                    WHERE FundingType = 'Locally funded')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT OpenDate  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM frpm      WHERE LowGrade = '1' AND HighGrade = '12'      ORDER BY Enrollment DESC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT City, SUM(Enrollment) AS TotalEnrollment FROM schools JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode WHERE LowGrade >= '1' AND HighGrade <= '12' GROUP BY City ORDER BY TotalEnrollment ASC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)"  FROM frpm  ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC  LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School Name, FRPM Count (K-12) / Enrollment (K-12) AS Eligible_FRPM_Rate FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.SOC = '66' ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Website FROM schools JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode WHERE Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)  FROM frpm  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode                   FROM schools                   WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Kacey' AND AdmLName1 = 'Gibson')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1 FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm      WHERE Enrollment (K-12) = (         SELECT MIN(Enrollment (K-12)) FROM frpm          WHERE Charter School (Y/N) = 1     ) )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1 AS FullName FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE ss.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Street, City, Zip, State  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds                   FROM satscores                   ORDER BY AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite                   LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'  AND sa.NumTstTakr BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31' AND schools.County = 'Fresno'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified' ORDER BY AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.Virtual = 'Y' ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT EducationalOptionType FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath) AS AverageMathScore, County  FROM schools  JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds  GROUP BY schools.CDSCode  ORDER BY (AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM satscores sa JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1) GROUP BY s.City	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT f.SchoolName, SUM(f.Enrollment) AS TotalEnrollment FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE s.StatusType = 'Active' AND s.DOCType = 'State Special Schools' GROUP BY f.SchoolName ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(OpenCount) AS MonthlyAverageOpenedSchools FROM (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS OpenCount     FROM schools     WHERE County = 'Alameda'       AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%'       AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'     GROUP BY strftime('%m', OpenDate) )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Merged' AND County = 'Orange' AND DistrictType = 'Unified School District') * 1.0 /     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Merged' AND County = 'Orange' AND DistrictType = 'Elementary School District') AS Ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate  FROM schools  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'  GROUP BY County  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Street, City, State, Zip  FROM schools  JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds  ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC  LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, MailStreet FROM schools JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds WHERE AvgScrRead = (SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores s  JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode  WHERE (s.AvgScrRead + s.AvgScrMath + s.AvgScrWrite) >= 1500  AND sch.MailCity = 'Lakeport'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS TotalTestTakers FROM satscores WHERE cds IN (     SELECT CDSCode     FROM schools     WHERE MailCity = 'Fresno' )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT schools.School, schools.MailZip  FROM schools  WHERE schools.AdmFName1 = 'Avetik' AND schools.AdmLName1 = 'Atoian'     OR schools.AdmFName2 = 'Avetik' AND schools.AdmLName2 = 'Atoian'     OR schools.AdmFName3 = 'Avetik' AND schools.AdmLName3 = 'Atoian'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND County = 'Colusa') * 1.0 /      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND County = 'Humboldt') AS ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE State = 'CA' AND City = 'San Joaquin' AND StatusType = 'Active'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone, Ext FROM schools JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 332	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Phone, Ext FROM schools WHERE Zip = '95203-3704'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IN ('Mike', 'Dante') AND AdmLName1 IN ('Larson', 'Alvarez')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Joaquin' AND Charter = 1 AND Virtual = 'P'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE City = 'Hickman' AND Charter = 1 AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'  AND Charter School (Y/N) = 0  AND Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) < 0.0018	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      s.School,      s.City,      s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1 AS Administrator1,      s.AdmFName2 || ' ' || s.AdmLName2 AS Administrator2,      s.AdmFName3 || ' ' || s.AdmLName3 AS Administrator3  FROM      schools s  WHERE      s.CharterNum = '00D2'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailCity = 'Hickman' AND CharterNum = '00D4'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SUM(CASE WHEN f.Charter Funding Type = 'Locally funded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS LocallyFundedPercentage FROM      frpm f JOIN      schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE      s.County = 'Santa Clara'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE OpenDate BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31'  AND County = 'Stanislaus'  AND FundingType = 'Directly funded'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalClosures  FROM schools  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'  AND City = 'San Francisco'  AND OpenDate < '1989-01-01'  AND (ClosedDate >= '1989-01-01' AND ClosedDate < '1990-01-01')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS ClosureCount FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31' AND DOCType = 'Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)' GROUP BY County ORDER BY ClosureCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESDist FROM schools WHERE DOCType = 'State Special Schools'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT StatusType, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'Alpine' AND StatusType IN ('Active', 'Closed')  GROUP BY StatusType	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT District Code FROM schools WHERE City = 'Fresno' AND Magnet = 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Enrollment FROM frpm WHERE School Name = 'California School for the Deaf-Fremont (State Special Schl)' AND Academic Year = '2014-2015'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode IN (SELECT CDSCode FROM schools WHERE MailStreet = 'PO Box 1040' AND SchoolType = 'Youth Authority School')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT LowGrade FROM frpm WHERE District Code = '0613360' AND School Type = 'District Special Education Consortia School' LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name FROM frpm WHERE NSLP Provision Status = 'Breakfast Provision 2' AND County Code = '37'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE f.NSLP_Provision_Status = 'Provision 2'  AND f.Low_Grade = '9'  AND f.High_Grade = '12'  AND s.County = 'Merced'  AND f.School_Type = 'High Schools (Public)'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.SchoolName, f."Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)"  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f.LowGrade = 'K' AND f.HighGrade = '9' AND s.County = 'Los Angeles'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSserved, COUNT(*) as count FROM schools WHERE City = 'Adelanto' GROUP BY GSserved ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE Virtual = 'P' AND (County = 'San Diego' OR County = 'Santa Barbara') GROUP BY County ORDER BY SchoolCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Latitude, SchoolType FROM schools ORDER BY Latitude DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, School, LowGrade  FROM schools  WHERE State = 'CA'  ORDER BY Latitude ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSoffered FROM schools ORDER BY Longitude DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE GSserved = 'K-8' AND Magnet = 1 GROUP BY City	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmFName1 AS FirstName, District AS District, COUNT(*) AS NameCount FROM schools GROUP BY AdmFName1, District ORDER BY NameCount DESC LIMIT 2	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", frpm."District Code"  FROM frpm  JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmLName1, District, County, School  FROM schools  WHERE CharterNum = '40'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'  AND City = 'San Bernardino'  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'  AND (SchoolType = 'Intermediate/Middle Schools (Public)' OR SchoolType = 'Unified Schools (Public)')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.AdmEmail1  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)                          FROM satscores                          WHERE AvgScrRead >= 1500 OR AvgScrMath >= 1500 OR AvgScrWrite >= 1500)  AND (sa.AvgScrRead >= 1500 OR sa.AvgScrMath >= 1500 OR sa.AvgScrWrite >= 1500)	----- bird -----	california_schools
